title: URO Tier 1 — T1 Foundation: ROS 2 base + luhtech_msgs + viewer-JWT + voxel_groups table
description: First child of URO Tier 1 multi-tarball arc. Lands the foundation building blocks for the URO viewer demo: ROS 2 Jazzy base image, colcon workspace with luhtech_msgs package (canonical 9 .msg files per strategy doc §6.A — VoxelPose, ResourceStatus, VoxelGroup, VoxelGroupArray, VoxelGroupEvent, VoxelStateArray, VoxelStateEvent, EFASState, EFASAlert), foxglove_bridge launch config, /api/uro/viewer-token + /internal/uro-ws-auth API routes, nginx /ws/uro/ subrequest auth config, and voxel_groups table migration (with GIN + B-tree indexes per strategy doc §6.D). No simulator nodes run yet (those land in T2). No production data load (production URN migration tracked separately). Foundation only.

outputs.description: ROS 2 Jazzy base container builds with luhtech_msgs package compiled; all 9 canonical message types exposed via `ros2 interface show`.
acceptanceCriteria: `docker build -t ectropy-uro-sim:t1 infrastructure/uro-sim/` succeeds in CI.
Built image size < 800 MB (per strategy doc T1 validation gate).
`colcon build --packages-select luhtech_msgs` succeeds inside container.

`ros2 interface show luhtech_msgs/msg/VoxelPose` (and equivalent for ResourceStatus, VoxelGroup, VoxelGroupArray, VoxelGroupEvent, VoxelStateArray, VoxelStateEvent, EFASState, EFASAlert) returns the expected schema with no errors.
Each of the 9 `.msg` files contains the field set canonical per strategy doc §6.A; field types and order match.

outputs.description: URO API endpoints land and behave correctly: viewer-token mint + internal WS auth subrequest.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /api/uro/viewer-token` with authenticated user returns 200 with JSON `{token, ttl_seconds, ws_url}`; the minted viewer JWT carries its own `jti` claim (for endpoint-side tracking — parent_jti binding deferred per overrideRecord below).
`GET /api/uro/viewer-token` without authenticated user returns 401.
`GET /internal/uro-ws-auth?token=<valid viewer JWT>` returns 200 with `X-Auth-Status: valid` header.
`GET /internal/uro-ws-auth?token=<expired or invalid>` returns 401.
`GET /internal/uro-ws-auth` without token query param returns 401.
Route handlers have JSDoc per project standards; corresponding tests added under `apps/api-gateway/src/routes/uro/__tests__/`.

outputs.description: nginx `/ws/uro/` upstream proxy + auth_request configured and validated.
acceptanceCriteria: `infrastructure/nginx/uro-bridge.conf` defines `location /ws/uro/` with `auth_request /internal/uro-ws-auth` directive and proxy_pass to `foxglove_bridge` upstream.
`nginx -t -c infrastructure/nginx/uro-bridge.conf` validates clean in CI.
Config sets `proxy_http_version 1.1`, `proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade`, `proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade'` for WS pass-through.
Config preserves `Sec-WebSocket-Protocol` header for `foxglove.websocket.v1` sub-protocol echo per R1/R2 research.

outputs.description: `voxel_groups` table migration lands cleanly on staging with full schema + indexes per strategy doc §6.D.
acceptanceCriteria: Prisma migration `20260605120000_add_voxel_groups` runs cleanly on staging without errors.

`psql -c '\d voxel_groups'` returns the expected schema: `id UUID PK`, `group_urn TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL`, `project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE`, `group_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (group_type IN (...9 values))`, `label`, `voxel_urns TEXT[]`, `base_priority INTEGER CHECK (1..100)`, `display JSONB`, `metadata JSONB`, `generated_by`, `is_dynamic`, `expires_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.

Three indexes present: `voxel_groups_voxel_urns_gin` (GIN on voxel_urns), `voxel_groups_project_type_idx` (B-tree on project_id, group_type), `voxel_groups_dynamic_expiry_idx` (B-tree on expires_at WHERE is_dynamic = TRUE).
Migration is reversible (down migration drops table cleanly).

outputs.description: foxglove_bridge launch config + Dockerfile entrypoint together produce a runnable bridge inside the container (image-level smoke test only — actual service running deferred to T2).
acceptanceCriteria: `infrastructure/uro-sim/launch/foxglove_bridge.launch.xml` declares foxglove_bridge node with port + retry + heartbeat config per R1/R2 research.

Container smoke test: `docker run --rm ectropy-uro-sim:t1 ros2 launch foxglove_bridge foxglove_bridge_launch.xml port:=8765` starts cleanly and logs READY within 30s (then exits since no Foxglove client connects — this is image-level smoke only).

outputs.description: `.roadmap/` substrate updated: `service-uro-sim` registered in `infrastructure-catalog.json` per `infrastructure-catalog.schema.json` v1.2.0; `uro-sim` service entry in `architecture.json` per `architecture-roadmap.schema.v1.json`; new FU filed in `follow-up-register.json` capturing T1's parent_jti binding deferral.
acceptanceCriteria: `.roadmap/infrastructure-catalog.json` `catalog.services[]` contains an entry with `id: service-uro-sim`, `name: URO Simulator`, `type: worker` (per `infrastructure-catalog.schema.json` v1.2.0 service.type enum — closest fit; T2+ adds simulator worker nodes), `containerImage: ectropy-uro-sim:t1`, `ports.internal: 8765`, `dependencies: [api-gateway]`, `status: planned`. `lastUpdated` timestamp updated. `auditTrail[]` (if present) gains an entry for this PR.

`.roadmap/architecture.json` `services[]` contains an entry with `serviceId: uro-sim`, `name: URO Simulator`, `description` summarizing T1's ROS 2 foundation role, `technology: 'ROS 2 Jazzy + foxglove_bridge + Docker'`, `port: 8765`, `deliverableId: d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation`, `priority: high`, `dependencies: [api-gateway, nginx-gateway]`, `apiEndpoints[]` describing the `/ws/uro/` WebSocket route (the `viewer-token` + `uro-ws-auth` HTTP routes are owned by api-gateway, not this service). `meta.lastUpdated` updated.
`.roadmap/follow-up-register.json` contains new FU `FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-PARENT-JTI-BINDING-1` (P2, status=open, blocked by `FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1`) filed during this deliverable.

T1 SPEC.md notes section captures the override rationale for merging with `FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1` + `FU-EB-URN-NAMESPACE-RECONCILE-1` still open. That rationale flows verbatim into the T1 `TRUTH-DELIVERED.json` `closureNotes.overrideRecord` field at SR-side closure (post-S7). FU `resolution` records themselves are NOT modified by T1 (the FUs remain open and tracked); the override accounting lives on the deliverable closure record per the established pattern from `d-2026-06-05-eb-prod-oauth-client-secret-fix` (PR #303 824419d).

Applier is idempotent on catalog + architecture modifications: presence-based check by `service.id` / `serviceId`; re-run is NO-OP. Applier validates the added entries against the schemas (no inline JSON-Schema dependency in applier — relies on EB CI `validate-roadmap-files` workflow to confirm post-merge).

outputs.description: `.dlp/deliverables/d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation/SPEC.md` lands on EB main — canonical EB-local markdown summary of this child deliverable.
acceptanceCriteria: SPEC.md present at canonical path on EB main post-merge.

SPEC.md content references parentDeliverable `d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation`, the SR-anchored T1 instance, and the corrected STRATEGY.md §4 + §4.A as canonical source for message types + topic surface.

preMerge: All 23 scope files staged exactly; PR scope-locked per memory #18.

`ajv-cli@5.0.0` validation of this deliverable.json against `deliverable.schema.json` v1.1.0 (canonical 3-flag with `_enums/luhtech-enums` + `_definitions/definitions` + `_definitions/forbidden-audit-paint-names`) PASS.
`docker build infrastructure/uro-sim/` succeeds in CI; image size < 800 MB.
Inside built container: `colcon build --packages-select luhtech_msgs` succeeds; `ros2 interface show` returns expected schema for all 9 .msg types.
`pnpm prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel <schema>` shows the voxel_groups migration as expected (no unrelated schema drift).
n8n canary `POST https://n8n.luh.tech/webhook/lead-capture` returns 200 immediately before PR open.
T1 PR required CI checks all SUCCESS without `--admin` override.
Cross-repo doctrine (memory #24): SR-side anchor PR for `schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation.json` MUST be merged on schema-registry main BEFORE this EB PR opens.
postMerge: Parent arc `d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation` transitions from `S4-authored` to `S5-in-progress` (per parent spec `validation.postMerge[0]`).
Prisma migrate deploy runs cleanly on staging; voxel_groups table queryable.
viewer-token endpoint deployed to staging; smoke-test returns 200 for authenticated user, 401 unauthenticated.
uro-ws-auth endpoint deployed to staging; internal subrequest path testable via curl with valid/invalid token.
Container image pushed to DOCR for staging consumption.
n8n canary `POST https://n8n.luh.tech/webhook/lead-capture` returns 200 within 10 minutes of merge.

SR-side TRUTH-DELIVERED instance for this child lands at `schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation.json` referencing the EB merge SHA (per cross-repo doctrine memory #24).

transitions.trigger: L4 approval to author T1 child deliverable spec post parent arc EB anchor landing (PR #305 cc5530f) and STRATEGY.md correction (PR #306 cc5530f)

EB PR #307 squash-merged 2026-06-05T19:22:35Z at commit c356d81cc40091b24abfcc829d5e1f0fced4680e. All 7 outputs (OUT-1..OUT-7) delivered: ROS 2 Jazzy base + luhtech_msgs (9 .msg files), URO viewer-token + internal WS auth endpoints, nginx /ws/uro/ subrequest auth, voxel_groups Prisma migration 20260605120000_add_voxel_groups, foxglove_bridge launch + entrypoint, service-uro-sim catalog + architecture entries, EB-local SPEC.md. In-execution framework substrate-correction at commit a7c6e94 within PR #307: route files refactored from Fastify imports to Express Router + handler exports (api-gateway is Express, not Fastify). Captured in TRUTH-DELIVERED.closureNotes.overrideRecord at canonical path.

TRUTH-DELIVERED instance authored 2026-06-05T19:35:00Z at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation.json by SR-chat. closureStatus: closed-with-debt. relatedFollowUps: FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1, FU-EB-URN-NAMESPACE-RECONCILE-1, FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-PARENT-JTI-BINDING-1, FU-EB-URO-T1-ROUTE-MOUNTING-1 (added during execution). rulePipelineEvidence: RULE-PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK-1 (framework-import substrate-correction via CI catch). Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4 cycle complete on this arc.

notes:
Cross-repo doctrine (memory #24): SR-chat amends the existing anchored T1 instance (currently at v1.0.1 SHA f6f2f59... from PR #132 bb98acd on schema-registry main) to this v1.0.4 spec before EB executes the T1 tarball PHASE_3 (PR open). The execution tarball (separate artifact, authored chat-side, sandbox-tested) is a v2 tarball landing 23 scope files via applier + commit_and_merge.sh phased ops. v1.0.4 fixes forward against the schema substrate Erik provided (infrastructure-catalog.schema.json v1.2.0, architecture-roadmap.schema.v1.json) — catalog + architecture entries land in this PR per their schemas rather than being deferred. P1 prerequisite handling — both FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1 and FU-EB-URN-NAMESPACE-RECONCILE-1 (parent arc OUT-4 P1 prereqs) will be captured as overrideRecord entries on T1's TRUTH-DELIVERED.json at SR closure (S7 post-merge). Rationale: (a) T1's viewer-token endpoint mints with its own jti for endpoint-level tracking; parent_jti binding requires user JWTs to have jti and is deferred to follow-up FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-PARENT-JTI-BINDING-1 (P2, filed during T1, status open, blocked by FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1) — security hardening, not a functional blocker for the viewer demo; (b) T1 creates voxel_groups table empty; no production data loaded in T1 (Maple Ridge bundle loads in T5), so production URN format does not affect T1 — URN reconcile remains tracked for completion before T5 production data load. T1 new code uses canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy:* from day one. SPEC.md (scope file #23 of 23) summarizes this for EB main. STRATEGY.md (landed PR #305 25a1f02 + corrected PR #306 cc5530f) §4 + §4.A are the canonical source for the 9 luhtech_msgs types and the topic surface — T1 .msg files implement §4.A verbatim. infrastructure-catalog service.type 'worker' chosen as closest enum fit — none of (api|web|worker|database|cache|queue|proxy|gateway|mcp-server|storage|monitoring|logging|scheduler|bim-viewer|file-processor) perfectly fits a ROS 2 simulator container; worker fits the T2+ simulator nodes runtime. If a more accurate type ('ros2-service' or similar) becomes available in a future catalog schema version, T1 entry can be updated.

[v1.0.5 RECONCILE AMENDMENT 2026-06-09] Deliverable lifecycleState reconciled with canonical TRUTH-DELIVERED already on SR main since 2026-06-05T19:35:00Z. Mixed-state substrate gap diagnosed by SR-chat substrate-before-write 2026-06-09: TRUTH-DELIVERED was authored on day-of-merge with full canonical shape (40-char mergeCommit c356d81cc40091b24abfcc829d5e1f0fced4680e, S8-closed, 4 relatedFollowUps including FU-EB-URO-T1-ROUTE-MOUNTING-1 added during execution, rulePipelineEvidence captured), but the deliverable instance was never updated from S4-authored to reflect the merge. This v1.0.5 amendment brings the deliverable into agreement with the TRUTH-DELIVERED without touching the canonical TRUTH-DELIVERED file. Full 40-char merge SHA pulled chat-side directly from the existing TRUTH-DELIVERED on SR main — no gh-CLI fetch required. Substrate-correction lesson: closure-backlog clearance must probe BOTH the deliverable AND the TRUTH-DELIVERED paths on SR main before authoring; otherwise risk of duplicate closure work and substrate regression. Memory #13 SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION addendum applies. Semver: PATCH (lifecycle reconcile + audit-trail completion; no behavior change to deliverable goal or scope).
